response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video content to identify intro and performance segments. 2. Identified the song title as 'BANZAI' and composer as 'Masa' (Yoshimasa Inoue) via on-screen text. 3. Searched for 'BANZAI 井上ヨシマサ lyrics' to obtain the accurate, original Japanese lyrics. 4. Translated the lyrics to English for the required field. 5. Mapped the scenes and vocal performance segments to timestamps. 6. Structured the data into the final JSON format.
response.global_summary: The video features an introduction by a virtual YouTuber followed by a vocal performance of the song 'BANZAI'.

scenes.description: The virtual YouTuber introduces the video and greets the audience. No vocal music is playing.
Atmospheric transition and preparation for the upcoming song performance. Instrumental music is present.
The song 'BANZAI' begins. The virtual YouTuber performs the song. Text identifying the song title and composer appears on screen.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Banzai, Banzai, spread your wings
Let's start running now towards the place of hope
I was trying to fly higher than anyone else
The nostalgic days push me from behind, but
The wings of courage are wounded
Days waiting for someone's words
What I loved someday turned into an obligation
Memories increased more than planned
Banzai, Banzai, spread your wings
Let's start running now towards the place of hope
The pocket of the sky packed with dreams
I don't have the room to take memories with me
Today exists only to nurture love with you, the future you
Forget what you learned, live by stepping out of bounds
Don't erase the graffiti in your textbooks, color it in with 24 colors
Banzai, Banzai, spread your wings
Let's start running now towards the place of hope
Let's throw away old maps and the like
A new adventure starts from here
Hello, hello, open the door
Let's jump out into the free sky, now
Banzai, Banzai, spread your wings
Let's start running now towards the place of hope
The time to change, bring up your courage
Everything I can do, as I wish
